This is ApacheBench, Version 2.3 <$Revision: 1903618 $>

Benchmarking 127.0.0.1 (be patient).....done

Server Hostname:        127.0.0.1
Server Port:            8088
Document Path:          /slow

# Intentionally malformed: this fixture omits the core numeric ApacheBench
# metrics such as Complete requests, Failed requests, Requests per second,
# Time per request, and Transfer rate. The verifier must reject it.
